svg.aria-label: Microsoft AitM phishing campaign, HashiCorp Agentic AI Zero Trust NHI, OpenAI PostgreSQL 800M user scaling
svg.title: Weekly digest 2026-01-23: Microsoft AitM phishing, HashiCorp NHI Zero Trust, OpenAI PostgreSQL scaling

g.text: Adversary-in-the-middle proxy : Evilginx2 v3 : MFA bypass : 12K enterprise mailboxes
Vault Agent : NHI rotation : short-lived tokens : 8-layer ZT enforcement
Sharding : logical replication : HikariCP : p99 < 8ms : $150M Inferact round
